description_long: This is a rectangular, woven wicker picnic basket with a natural brown coloration and a tightly interlaced exterior. The basket features a flat, hinged lid that covers the entire top and is secured by two simple woven loops at the front. The weave is consistent and moderately tight, giving the basket a sturdy yet slightly textured appearance. The sides and lid display a uniform basket-weave pattern, with the lid's weave running parallel to its longer edge. The base is reinforced with small, flat feet to provide stability when placed on the ground. There are no visible decorative elements or fabric linings, and the overall design is functional and rustic, suitable for carrying food or personal items in urban parks or outdoor settings.
description: A rectangular, brown wicker picnic basket with a flat, hinged lid and woven loops for closure. The basket has a sturdy, rustic appearance with a consistent, tight weave.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid, two woven closure loops, and the basket's rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basket and the parallel weave pattern on the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lid and the uninterrupted weave pattern without closure loops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the basket's depth and the lid's weave.
attribute_handle_type: absent; no visible handles on the basket exterior
attribute_lid_presence: Present; flat, full-coverage lid attached at the back, secured by woven loops at the front
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, moderately tight basket weave with parallel lines on the lid and consistent interlacing on the sides
attribute_closure_mechanism: Woven loop closure; two simple wicker loops at the front secure the lid
